title: Jujutsu Domain
description: This is an expansion mod for Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight) from orca_san_
body:
# Jujutsu Domain
Added an independent domain system for players, allowing them to set their own independent domain size.

# Key Bindings
- LeftControl : Recover Unstable. (when you unlocked anti open barrier type domain advancement)
- LeftAlt : Fast Domain Expansion. (when you unlocked mastery domain expansion advancement)
- B : Change Domain Type. (when you unlocked fame special, sorcerer grade special, reverse cursed technique 2, anti open barrier type domain advancement)

# Attention
The mod author has not yet adapted to other expansion mod, so the mod author doesn't know what will happen, please add with caution.

This expansion mod is developed by Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight) version 50.1, and it is recommended to use version 50.1 for gameplay, other versions may encounter errors.
